query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `sanad_ratings` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `office_id` int NOT NULL,
  `company_id` int NOT NULL,
  `reviewer_user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `service_request_id` int,
  `overall_rating` int NOT NULL,
  `speed_rating` int,
  `quality_rating` int,
  `communication_rating` int,
  `review_title` varchar(255),
  `review_body` text,
  `is_verified` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `is_published` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `moderation_note` text,
  `moderated_by` int,
  `moderated_at` timestamp,
  `helpful_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `idx_srating_office` (`office_id`),
  INDEX `idx_srating_company` (`company_id`),
  INDEX `idx_srating_published` (`is_published`),
  INDEX `idx_srating_verified` (`is_verified`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `sanad_rating_replies` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `rating_id` int NOT NULL,
  `replied_by_user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `reply_body` text NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `idx_srreply_rating` (`rating_id`)
);
